trivia_bullets.text: Common red Sorcery, THB original print only (non-foil variant). Carries the Escape keyword — THB's central graveyard-rebuy mechanic. Base cost 1R, escape cost 2R + exile two graveyard cards.

"It's hard to keep a satyr down, even in the Underworld." Both lore-accurate (satyrs associated with trickery and persistence on Theros) and a mechanical wink — the card literally cannot stay in the graveyard.

Hipsters of the Coast common review grade F in limited; cube review skeptical about Mono Red recursive viability but ranked top-3 for Peasant/Pauper. Sees Pioneer play in Transmogrify/Boros Creativity as cheap recurring sacrifice fodder. Legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander including Satyr Enchanter shells.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: THB Common Review 2020-01
Hipsters of the Coast: THB Cube Review Red 2020-03
WebSearch: Satyr's Cunning Pioneer via mtgdecks.net snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Generates a 1/1 red Satyr token with 'This token can't block' — the non-blocking clause is a recurring flavor marker for satyrs on Theros, implying they are too reckless to stand their ground. Art by Deruchenko Alexander.
